sourceDesc.p: Derived from CDSL MW, PWG, PWK, AP90, GRA, and FRI source records for interoperability analysis.

projectDesc.p: tei-archival-profile-v0.1; TEI is used as the archival/textual model. Raw CDSL records are preserved as escaped source-entry quotes, while selected lexical structures are promoted into TEI entry, form, sense, citation, and relation elements.

revisionDesc.change: Included in the full machine-reviewed TEI profile.

sense.note: No stable machine definition could be extracted; source record is preserved in cit/quote.

listBibl.head: Machine-extracted citation index; source quotes preserve the archival text.

cit.quote: <L>22015.60<pc>126,2<k1>A<k2>A/<e>1A ¦ <s>A-samudram</s> or <s>A-samudrAt</s>, ‘as far as the ocean’ or ‘from the ocean’ (but not including it) <LEND>

<L>7766<pc>1-0581<k1>A<k2>A<h>2
2. {#A#}¦
<div n="1"> 1) <lex>adv.</lex>
<div n="2"> a) {%her, herzu%}: {#A tU na^ indra kOSika mandasA\naH su\taM pi^ba#}
<ls>ṚV. 1,10,11.</ls> {#a\nu\kA\maM ta^rpayeTA\mindrA^varuRa rA\ya A#}
<ls n="ṚV. 1,">17,3.</ls> {#A pra dra^va#}
<ls>AV. 3,4,5.</ls> {#A pra yA^tu parA\vata^H#}
<ls n="AV.">6,35,1.</ls> {#A pra cya^veTAm#}
<ls n="AV.">18,4,49.</ls> In dieser Bedeutung überaus häufig in Verbindung mit Verben {%der Bewegung.%}
<div n="2">— b) anreihend: {%dazu, ferner, auch, und%}: {#sarva^M pa\ReH sama^vindanta\ Boja^na\maSvA^vanta\M goma^nta\mA pa\SuM nara^H#}
<ls>ṚV. 1,83,4.</ls> {#(tanmahyamAhuH) tada\yaM keto^ hf\da A vi ca/zwe#}
<ls n="ṚV. 1,">24,12.</ls> {#ma\hAngarBo\ mahyA jA\tame^zAm#}
<ls n="ṚV.">3,31,3.</ls> {#udidA^Bya\H Suci\rA pU\ta e^mi#}
<ls n="ṚV.">10,17,10.</ls> {#apa\ dvezA\MsyA kf^Di#}
<ls n="ṚV.">3,16,5.</ls> {#Sa\tamA sa\hasra^m#}
<ls n="ṚV.">2,14,7.</ls> {#mi\mi\kzvA samiLA^Bi\rA#}
<ls n="ṚV.">1,48,16.</ls> <ls n="ṚV. 1,">7,2.</ls> <ls n="ṚV. 1,">150,1.</ls> <ls n="ṚV.">4,11,1.</ls> <ls n="ṚV. 4,">12,2.</ls>
<div n="2">— c) steigernd und hervorhebend: {%zumal, ganz, gar%}; nicht selten dient es nur um auf das Wort, nach welchem es steht, den Nachdruck zu werfen. {#aDa^ sva\nAnma\rutA\M viSva\mA sadma\ pArTi^vam . are^janta\ pra mAnu^zAH#}
<ls>ṚV. 1,38,10.</ls> {#ko vo\ varzi^zWa\ A na^raH#}
<ls n="ṚV. 1,">37,6.</ls> {#tatsu no\ viSve^ a\rya A sadA^ gfRanti kA\rava^H#}
<ls n="ṚV.">6,45,33.</ls> {#baLi\tTA ma^hi\mA vA\mindrA^gnI\ pani^zWa\ A#}
<ls n="ṚV. 6,">59,2.</ls> {#yaH su^nva\te paca^te du\Dra A ci^t#}
<ls n="ṚV.">2,12,15.</ls> {#muhu\rA#}
<ls n="ṚV. 2,">4,7.</ls> <ls n="ṚV.">7,20,2.</ls> {#pra bo^DayA\ pura^MDiM jA\ra A sa^sa\tImi^va#}
<ls n="ṚV.">1,134,3.</ls> {#udI^raya pi\tarA^ jA\ra A Baga^m#}
<ls n="ṚV.">10,11,6.</ls> <ls n="ṚV. 10,">22,3.</ls> <ls>AV. 6,33,1.</ls> <ls n="AV.">7,22,1.</ls> {#taddevA jyotizAM jyotirAyurhyopAsate 'mftam#}
<ls>ŚAT. BR. 14,7,2,20</ls> (= <ls>BṚH. ĀR. UP. 4,4,16). 9,2,3,44.</ls> {#tasyEza AdeSo yadetadvidyuto vyadyutadA itIti nyamImizadA#}
<ls>KENOP. 29.</ls> Aus Stellen wie ein Theil der hier angeführten wurde die Bedeutung {%wie%} abgeleitet, welche aber nicht unmittelbar im Worte liegt.
<ls>NIR. 3,13.</ls>
<ls>ŚAṂK.</ls> zu <ls>KENOP. 19.</ls>
<div n="2">— d) zur Verstärkung oder näheren Bestimmung verschiedener <ab>praepp.</ab> dienend; bei {#antar#}
<ls>ṚV. 9,67,23.</ls> {#aDi#}
<ls n="ṚV. 9,">73,5.</ls> <ls n="ṚV. 9,73,">6.</ls> {#anu#}
<ls n="ṚV.">2,38,7.</ls> {#sacA#}
<ls n="ṚV.">1,9,3.</ls> <ab>S. u.</ab> <ab>d. Ww.</ab>
<div n="1">— 2) <ab>praep.</ab>
<div n="2"> a) {%zu — hin, bis an, bis zu, bis auf, bevor%}:
<div n="3"> α) mit <ab>vorang.</ab> <ab>acc.</ab>: {#tA~ A #}
[Page1-0582]
{# madA^ya vajrahasta pI\taye\ hari^ByAM yA\hyoka\ A#}
<ls>ṚV. 7,32,4.</ls> {#f\tasya\ yoni\mA#}
<ls n="ṚV.">9,66,12.</ls> {#(DAvati) sa\pta pra\vata\ A diva^m#}
<ls n="ṚV. 9,">54,2.</ls> {#joza\mA#}
<ls n="ṚV.">8,83,6.</ls> <ls n="ṚV.">7,43,4.</ls>
<div n="3">— β) mit <ab>folg.</ab> <ab>acc.</ab>, häufig im
<ls>ŚAT. BR.</ls> in Verbindung mit {#it#}, wozu ein Zeitwort der Bewegung zu ergänzen: {#etpuroqASameva kUrmaM BUtaM sarpantam#}
<ls n="ŚAT. BR.">1,6,2,3.</ls> {#punarema iti devA edagniM tiroBUtam#}
<ls n="ŚAT. BR.">2,2,3,3.</ls> <ls n="ŚAT. BR. 2,2,">4,12.</ls> <ls n="ŚAT. BR. 2,">3,4,2.</ls> <ls n="ŚAT. BR.">4,1,3,4.</ls> <ls n="ŚAT. BR.">11,5,1,4.</ls> <ls n="ŚAT. BR. 11,5,1,">11.</ls>
<div n="3">— γ) mit <ab>folg.</ab> <ab>abl.</ab>
<ls>P. 2,1,13.</ls> <ls n="P. 2,">3,10.</ls> {#sva\styA gf\heBya\ Ava\sA A vi\mocanA^t#}
<ls>ṚV. 3,53,20.</ls> {#AsyA ya\jYasyo\dfca^H#}
<ls>VS. 4,9.</ls> {#A mUlA^t#}
<ls>AV. 7,59,1.</ls> <ls n="AV.">12,4,16.</ls> {#A ja^ri\mRaH#}
<ls n="AV.">18,3,62.</ls> <ls n="AV.">1,14,3.</ls> {#SIrzRa A pucCAt#}
<ls>ŚAT. BR. 10,2,1,9.</ls> <ls n="ŚAT. BR.">3,1,3,9.</ls> <ls n="ŚAT. BR.">12,8,3,17.</ls> {#EtasmAtkAlAt#}
<ls n="ŚAT. BR.">4,2,4,5.</ls> <ls n="ŚAT. BR.">1,5,2,9.</ls> <ls n="ŚAT. BR.">2,4,2,21.</ls> <ls n="ŚAT. BR.">3,2,1,7.</ls> {#yadidaM kiM ca miTunamA pipIlikAByaH#}
<ls n="ŚAT. BR.">14,4,2,9</ls> (= <ls>BṚH. ĀR. UP. 1,4,4</ls>). {#yattapastapyata A mETunAt#}
<ls n="ŚAT. BR.">10,4,4,4.</ls> <ls>KĀTY. ŚR. 2,2,2.</ls> <ls n="KĀTY. ŚR. 2,">6,9.</ls> <ls n="KĀTY. ŚR.">12,4,1.</ls> <ls n="KĀTY. ŚR. 12,">6,18.</ls> {#A samudrAttu vE pUrvAdA samudrAttu paScimAt . tayorevAntaraM giryorAryAvartaM vidurbuDAH ..#}
<ls>M. 2,22.</ls> {#A hEva sa naKAgreByaH paramaM tapyate tapaH#}
<ls n="M. 2,">167.</ls> {#A zoqaSAt#} {%bis zum 16ten%} (Jahre)
<ls n="M. 2,">38.</ls> {#ArkadarSanAt#}
<ls n="M. 2,">101.</ls> <ls n="M. 2,">108.</ls> <ls n="M. 2,">171.</ls> <ls n="M. 2,">243.</ls> <ls n="M. 2,">244.</ls> <ls n="M.">3,279.</ls> <ls n="M.">4,137.</ls> <ls n="M.">5,88.</ls> <ls n="M. 5,">158.</ls> <ls n="M.">6,31.</ls> <ls n="M.">9,70.</ls> <ls n="M. 9,">89.</ls> <ls n="M.">10,64.</ls> <ls n="M. 10,">91.</ls> <ls n="M. 10,">104.</ls> <ls>YĀJÑ. 3,23.</ls> <ls>MBH. 1,4405.</ls> <ls>BHAG. 8,16.</ls> <ls>R. 1,6,25.</ls> <ls n="R.">2,32,32.</ls> <ls n="R. 2,32,">38.</ls> <ls n="R.">3,34,23.</ls> <ls n="R. 3,">46,2.</ls> {#udayaM parvataM gatvA A mAsAdvinivartata#} {%bevor ein Monat um ist, in Monatsfrist%}
<ls n="R.">4,40,69.</ls> <ls n="R. 4,">58,34.</ls> <ls>ŚĀK. 2.</ls> <ls n="ŚĀK.">26.</ls> <ls n="ŚĀK.">71,10.</ls> <ls>RAGH. 1,90.</ls> <ls n="RAGH. 1,">91.</ls> An das <ab>subst.</ab> tritt <ab>pleon.</ab> noch {#anta#} {%Grenze%}: {#odakAntAt#}
<ls>ŚĀK. 54,21.</ls>
<div n="3">— δ) verbindet sich mit dem regierten Worte zu einem <lex>adv.</lex> <ab>comp.</ab>
<ls>P. 2,1,13.</ls> {#aSvApadAnyAkIwapataMgapipIlakam#}
<ls>CHĀND. UP. 7,2,1. 8,1.</ls> {#AsapiRqakriyAkarma#}
<ls>M. 3,247.</ls> {#AkarRamUlamAkfzya#} ({#kArmukam#})
<ls>R. 4,9,106.</ls> {#AmaraRam#}
<ls>PAÑCAT. I,44.</ls> {#maRibanDAdAkanizWaM karasya karaBo bahiH#}
<ls>AK. 2,6,2,32.</ls> {#AvatsarAntam#}
<ls>KATHĀS. 23,20.</ls> <ls n="KATHĀS.">10,208.</ls>
<ls>VID. 54.</ls> {#AkumAraM yaSaH pARineH#}
<ls>P. 2,1,13</ls>, <ab>Sch.</ab>
{#Adfzwiprasaram#} (so ist zu lesen)
<ls>AMAR. 74.</ls> Statt {#AsamudrAnte#}
<ls>R. 4,37,3</ls> ist wohl {#˚ntam#} zu lesen. Am <ab>Anf.</ab> eines <ab>comp.</ab> ohne Flexionszeichen: {#AyojanasuganDin#}
<ls>MBH. 1,6965.</ls> {#AjAnubAhu#} {%dessen Arme bis an die Knie reichen%}
<ls>R. 1,1,12.</ls> {#AkarRamuktErizuBiH#}
<ls n="R.">3,69,16.</ls> <ls>RAGH. 1,5.</ls> <ls>ŚĀK. 80.</ls> <ls n="ŚĀK.">145.</ls> <ls>VID. 21.</ls> {#AmaraRAnta#} (
<ls>HIT. I,180</ls>) oder {#AmaraRAntika#} (
<ls>M. 9,101.</ls>
<ls>MBH. 3,8333</ls>) {%sich bis zum Tode erstreckend.%} <ab>Vgl.</ab> {#Ajarasam, Avyuzam, otsUryam#} .
<div n="3">— ε) bildet mit dem <ab>reg.</ab> Worte ein <ab>adj. comp.</ab>: {#AsaptamAMstasya#} ({%die siebente Welt mit%}) {#lokAnhinasti#}
<ls>MUṆḌ. UP. 1,2,3.</ls> {#AgopAlA dvijAtayaH#}
<ls>MBH. 2,531.</ls> {#kulamAsaptamaM#} (kann auch <lex>adv.</lex> sein) {#hanti#}
<ls>R. 4,34,16.</ls>
<ls>YĀJÑ. 1,205.</ls>
[Page1-0583]
<div n="2">— b) {%von — her, von — aus, von — weg, von — an%}:
<div n="3"> α) mit <ab>folg.</ab> <ab>abl.</ab>: {#trirA di\vaH sa^vita\rvAryA^Ri di\ve di^ ve\ A su^va\ trirno\ ahna^H#}
<ls>ṚV. 3,56,6.</ls> <ls n="ṚV. 3,56,">7.</ls> {#A pa^rA\vata^H#}
<ls n="ṚV.">1,92,3.</ls> <ls n="ṚV. 1,92,">17.</ls> {#AntA\dA pa^rA\kAt#}
<ls n="ṚV. 1,">30,21.</ls> {#Sye\no ha\vyaM na^ya\tvA para^smAt#}
<ls>AV. 3,3,4.</ls> {#A prajApatito manoH#}
<ls>MBH. 1,3756.</ls>
<ls>R. 1,5,1.</ls>
<ls>RAGH. 1,17.</ls> {#A bAlyAttApaso 'Bavam#}
<ls>KATHĀS. 24,186.</ls> {#A janmanaH#} (<ab>v. l.</ab> {#janmataH#})
<ls>ŚĀK. 121.</ls> {#A mUlAcCrotumicCAmi#}
<ls n="ŚĀK.">14,19.</ls> <ls>KATHĀS. 25,195.</ls> {#A mUlataH#}
<ls n="KATHĀS.">12,191.</ls> <ls>VID. 130.</ls> Mit <ab>folg.</ab> {#praBfti#} in einer <is>Prākṛt</is>-Stelle: {#A mUlAdo pahudi#}
<ls>ŚĀK. CH. 13,6.</ls>
<div n="3">— β) mit <ab>vorang.</ab> <ab>abl.</ab>: {#avA^daho di\va A dasyu^m#}
<ls>ṚV. 1,33,7.</ls> {#sa\mA\nAdA sada^saH#}
<ls n="ṚV.">2,17,7.</ls> {#a\smadA ni\do va\DEra^jeta durma\tim#}
<ls n="ṚV.">1,129,6.</ls> <ls n="ṚV.">8,66,6.</ls> <ls>AV. 4,15,11.</ls>
<div n="3">— γ) bildet mit dem <ab>reg.</ab> Worte ein <lex>adv.</lex> <ab>comp.</ab>: {#mAM cApi — jAnanti hyAkumAram#}
<ls>MBH. 3,1403.</ls> {#sarvamAjanma vfttAntaM#} (so ist zu trennen) {#vistarAdidamabravIt#}
<ls>KATHĀS. 2,29</ls>
(<ab>vgl.</ab> <ls n="KATHĀS. 2,">28</ls> : {#tadbrUhi nijavfttAntaM janmanaH praBfti#}). In {#ASiraHpAdam#} {%vom Kopfe bis zu den Füssen%}
<ls n="KATHĀS.">4,53</ls> ist Anfang und Ende mit {#A#} zu einem <ab>comp.</ab> verbunden. Am <ab>Anf.</ab> eines <ab>comp.</ab> ohne Flexionszeichen: {#AjanmaSudDAnAm#}
<ls>RAGH. 1,5.</ls>
<ls>KATHĀS. 21,122.</ls> Auch bei dieser Bedeutung mit <ab>pleon.</ab> {#anta#} {%Grenze%}: {#AmajjanAntaM vfttAntaM saKyustasya ca varRayan#}
<ls>KATHĀS. 10,69.</ls>
<div n="2">— c) {%aus, von, unter%}, zur Hervorhebung eines Einzelnen unter Mehreren: {#yaSci\dDi tvA^ ba\huBya\ A su\tAvA^~ A\vivA^sati#}
<ls>ṚV. 1,84,9.</ls> <ls n="ṚV. 1,84,">20.</ls> {#yaste\ saKi^Bya\ A vara^m#}
<ls n="ṚV. 1,">4,4.</ls>
<div n="2">— d) {%in, bei%}, mit dem <ab>loc.</ab>
<ls>NIR. 5,5.</ls> {#dama\ A#}
<ls>ṚV. 1,61,9.</ls> <ls n="ṚV. 1,">73,4.</ls> {#gAvo\ na yava^se\zvA#}
<ls n="ṚV. 1,">91,13.</ls> {#kiyA\tyA#}
<ls n="ṚV. 1,">113,10.</ls> {#u\pA\ka A#}
<ls n="ṚV. 1,">27,6.</ls> {#Sa\ra\Ra A#}
<ls n="ṚV. 1,">150,1.</ls> <ls n="ṚV. 1,">82,2.</ls> <ls n="ṚV. 1,">112,17.</ls> <ls n="ṚV.">2,30,1.</ls> <ls n="ṚV.">4,11,1.</ls> {#a\Bra A#}
<ls n="ṚV.">5,48,1.</ls> {#sIda\nyonA\ vane\zvA#}
<ls n="ṚV.">9,62,8.</ls> {#ajI^jano amfta\ martye\zvA#}
<ls n="ṚV.">9,110,4.</ls> <ls n="ṚV. 9,">73,7.</ls> {#marya\M na yozA^ kfRute sa\DasTa\ A#}
<ls n="ṚV.">10,40,2.</ls> {#sa\mu\dra A gU\|am#}
<ls n="ṚV. 10,">72,7.</ls> {#vara\ A pf^Ti\vyAH#}
<ls>AV. 7,8,1.</ls> <ls n="AV.">16,4,2.</ls>
<div n="2">— e) im <ab>comp.</ab> mit einem <lex>adj.</lex> oder <ab>partic.</ab> {%etwas, ein wenig, kaum%}
<ls>P. 2,2,18</ls>, <ls>SAUN.</ls> <is>Vārtt</is>. 3.
Scheinbar <lex>adv.</lex>, aber ursprünglich gewiss <ab>praep.</ab> und zwar in der unter {%a.%} aufgeführten Bedeutung: {#ApIta#} {%bis zum Gelben angelangt, gelblich%}
<ls>R. 2,76,4.</ls> {#Alohita#}
<ab>v. l.</ab> zu <ls>ŚĀK. 69,2.</ls> {#AnIla#} {%bläulich%}
<ls>H. 1239.</ls>
<ls>RAGH. 3,8.</ls> {#ApiYcara#}
<ls n="RAGH.">16,51.</ls> {#ApARqura#}
<ls>AMAR. 89.</ls> {#ozRa (A + uzRa)#}
<ls>P. 1,1,14</ls>, <ab>Sch.</ab>
{#Akuwila#} {%etwas gebogen%}
<ls>ŚĀK. 184.</ls> {#AtiraScIna#} {%etwas in die Quere gehend%}
<ls>DAŚAK.</ls> in <ls>BENF. Chr. 198,23.</ls> {#Apakva#} (<ab>s. d.</ab>)
<ls>AK. 2,9,47.</ls> {#Alola#}
<ls>BHARTṚ. 3,48</ls> ({#AlolAyatalocanAH#}).{# Alakzya#} {%kaum, eben sichtbar%}
<ls>ŚĀK. 176.</ls> {#ABugna#} {%ein wenig gebogen%}
<ls>RAGH. 1,83.</ls> — Um diese Partikel von der <lex>interj.</lex> {#A#} zu unterscheiden, versehen die indischen Grammatiker und Lexicographen dieselbe mit einem {#N#} am Ende ({#AN#}).
<ls>P. 1,1,14.</ls> <ls n="P. 1,">4,89.</ls> <ls n="P.">2,1,13.</ls> <ls n="P. 2,">3,10.</ls>
<ls>VOP. 1,8.</ls> <ls n="VOP.">2,19.</ls>
<ls>AK. 3,4,32,1.</ls> (<ls>COL. 3,4,28,1.</ls>) <ls>H. an. 7,2.</ls> <ls>MED. avy. 13.</ls> Euphonische Regeln in Betreff dieses {#A#}
<ls>P. 6,1,74.</ls> <ls n="P. 6,1,">95.</ls> <ls n="P. 6,1,">126</ls> ({#A~#}).
<ls>VOP. 2,5.</ls> <ls n="VOP. 2,">19.</ls> In vielen in Europa gedruckten Werken, in denen sonst die Trennung der Wörter beobachtet wird, findet man {#A#} mit einem folgenden <ab>abl.</ab> fälschlich zu einem <ab>comp.</ab> verbunden.
<LEND>

<L>13334<pc>1-157-c<k1>A<k2>A/<h>1 <hom>1.</hom> {#A/#}¦ <div n="1">— 1〉 <lex>Adv.</lex> <div n="2">— a〉 {%heran, herbei%}. <div n="2">— b〉 {%dazu, ferner, auch%}. <div n="2">— c〉 das vorangehende Wort steigernd und hervorhebend; {%gerade, recht, zumal%}. Oft nur durch stärkere Betonung des vorangehenden Wortes wiederzugeben. <div n="1">— 2〉 <ab>Praep.</ab> <div n="2">— a〉 mit vorangehendem <ab>Acc.</ab> {%zu — hin, bis an, — zu%}. <div n="2">— b〉 mit folgendem <ab>Acc.</ab> {%mit Ausschluss von%}. <div n="2">— c〉 mit vorangehendem <ab>Abl.</ab> <div n="3">— α〉 {%von — her, — aus, — weg, — an%}. <div n="3">— β〉 {%aus, von, unter%} (zur Hervorhebung eines Einzelnen unter Mehreren). <div n="2">— d〉 mit folgendem <ab>Abl.</ab> <div n="3">— α〉 {%bis zu%} (einem <ab>best.</ab> Orte, Zeitpunkte oder Eintritt eines Falles). <div n="3">— β〉 {%von — an%}. <div n="2">— e〉 mit vorangehendem <ab>Loc.</ab> {%an, auf, in, bei, zu%}. <div n="1">— 3〉 am <ab>Anf.</ab> eines <ab>Comp.</ab> <div n="2">— a〉 eines <lex>Adj.</lex> {%bis zu — sich erstreckend%}. <div n="2">— b〉 eines <lex>Adv.</lex> {%bis zu%}. <div n="2">— c〉 vor einem <lex>Adj.</lex> oder <ab>Subst.</ab> {%etwas, ein wenig, kaum; gering%}. <LEND>

<L>5720<pc>0220-1<k1>A<k2>A {#A#}¦ {@1@} Used as a particle or <lbinfo n="inter+jection"/> interjection showing ({%a%}) assent; ‘yes’, ‘verily’. ({%b%}) Compassion ({#anukaMpA#}) ‘Ah’. ({%c%}) Pain or regret (usually written {#As#} or {#AH#} <ab>q. v.</ab>), ‘alas’. ({%a%}) Recollection ({#smaraRa#}) ‘Ah’, ‘Oh’; {#A evaM kilAsIt#} <ls>U. 6.</ls> ({%e%}) But (used as a disjunctive conjunction). ({%f%}) And (used as a cumulative <lbinfo n="con+junction"/> conjunction). ({%g%}) Sometimes used as an expletive; {#A evaM manyase#}. In all these senses {#A#} is treated as a Pragṛhya vowel (does not form any Saṃdhi with a following vowel) <ls>P. I. 1. 14.</ls> {@--2@} (As a prefix to verbs and nouns) ({%a%}) it expresses the senses of near, near to, towards, from all sides, all around (see the several verbs). ({%b%}) With verbs of motion, taking, carrying &c. it shows the reverse of the action; as {#gam#} to go, {#Agam#} to come; {#dA#} to give, {#AdA#} to take; {#nI#} to carry, {#AnI#} to bring. {@--3@} (As a separable preposition with <ab>abl.</ab>) it shows either ({%a%}) the limit inceptive ({#aBiviDi#}), from, ever since, away from, out of, off, from among; {#AmUlAt SrotumicCAmi#} <ls>Ś. 1</ls>; {#bahuBya#} {#A#} from out of many; {#A janmanaH#} <ls>Ś. 5. 25</ls> ever since (her) birth; {#A manoH#} <ls>U. 6. 18.</ls> ({%b%}) Or, it <lbinfo n="ex+presses"/> expresses the limit exclusive or <lbinfo n="con+clusive"/> conclusive ({#maryAdA#}), till, until, upto, as far as, unto; {#AN maryAdABiviDyoH#} <lbinfo n="ls:P. II.+1"/> <ls>P. II. 1. 13</ls>; see {#aBiviDi#}; {#A#} <lbinfo n="paritozAdvidu#zAM"/> {#paritozAdviduzAM#} <ls>Ś. 1. 2</ls> till the learned are <lbinfo n="satis+fied"/> satisfied; {#A kElAsAt#} <ls>Me. 11</ls> upto or as far as Kailāsa; {#odakAMtAt#} <ls>Ś. 4</ls>; <lbinfo n="ls:U. 1.+ 37"/> <ls>U. 1. 37</ls>; <ls>V. 2. 2.</ls> In this sense {#A#} <lbinfo n="some+times"/> sometimes governs the <ab>acc.</ab>; {#SatamA jAtIH#} upto a hundred births. ({%c%}) In both these senses {#A#} frequently enters [Page0220-1b+ 43] into compound, forming either <lbinfo n="Avya+yībhāva"/> Avyayībhāva <ab>comp.</ab> or compound <lbinfo n="adjec+tives"/> adjectives; {#AbAlaM#} (or {#A bAleByaH#}) {#hariBaktiH#} commencing with or including <lbinfo n="child+ren"/> children; {#Amukti#} (or {#AmukteH#}) {#saMsAraH#} <ls>Sk.</ls> till final emancipation; {#AmeKalaM#} <lbinfo n="ls:Ku.+ 1. 5"/> <ls>Ku. 1. 5</ls> as far as.; {#AmaraRaM#} <ls>Pt. 1</ls> till death; {#AgopAlaM nanftuH#} <ls>K. 70</ls> down to the cowherd; {#AgopAlA dvijAtayaH#} including the cowherds. Sometimes the compound so formed stands as the first member of other <lbinfo n="com+pounds"/> compounds, {#so'#} <lbinfo n="hamAjanmaSudDAnAmAPalodaya#karmaRAM"/> {#hamAjanmaSudDAnAmAPalodayakarmaRAM .#} <lbinfo n="AsamudrakzitISAnAmAnAkaraTavartma#nAM"/> {#AsamudrakzitISAnAmAnAkaraTavartmanAM#} <ls>R. 1. 5</ls>; {#AgaMqavilaMbi#} <ls>Ś. 6. 17</ls>; {#AkarRalaMbi#} <ls>M. 5. 10.</ls> ({%d%}) Used with <ab>loc.</ab> it has the sense of ‘in’, ‘at’ (mostly <ab>Ved.</ab>); {#gAvo na yavasezvA#} <ls>Rv. 1. 91. 13.</ls> {@--4@} With adjectives (or sometimes with nouns) {#A#} has a diminutive force; {#ApAMqura#} a little white, whitish; {#Alakzya#} <ls>Ś. 7. 17</ls> slightly visible; {#AkaMpaH#} gentle shaking; so {#AnIla, Arakta#}. {@--5@} (As a separable adverb) {#A#} chiefly <lbinfo n="oc+curs"/> occurs in the Vedas and means near, near to, or towards, there to, further; and also, even; in many cases it emphasizes the word which <lbinfo n="pre+cedes"/> precedes it, and when placed after <lbinfo n="pre+positions"/> prepositions it strengthens their sense. <LEND>

<L>1444<pc>0168<k1>A<k2>A/ {@ā́,@}¦ aus *ana entstanden und daher zum <lang>griech.</lang> <gk>ἀνά</gk>, <lang>goth.</lang> ana [<ls>Cu. 〔421〕</ls>] zu stellen. Die Grundbedeutung ist „an“, sodass es sich zunächst auf die Begrenzung oder Oberfläche, auf die unmittelbare Nähe bezieht. Daher heisst es als Richtungswort „heran, herbei“ (<ab>d. h.</ab> sich bis in die unmittelbare Nähe des Redenden bewegend) oder „hinan, hinzu“ (sich bis in die unmittelbare Nähe des vorgestellten Gegenstandes bewegend). Daher bezeichnet es als Präposition mit folgendem Ablativ „bis an, bis zu“; während es als Präposition mit vorangehendem Accusativ, Ablativ, Locativ nur die örtliche Bedeutung dieser Casus stärker hervorhebt. Doch ist diese Stellung in beiden Fällen nicht eine unabänderlich feste. Als Bindewort ist es anreihend, in der Bedeutung „und“, <ab>d. h.</ab> sich hieran (an das Gesagte) anschliessend, hierzu hinzutretend. Endlich als Andeuter hebt es das nächst vorhergehende (betonte) Wort in dem Sinne hervor, dass dessen Begriff in seinem vollen Umfange, in seiner recht eigentlichen Bedeutung gelten solle. So verbindet es sich als. <div n="P">Richtungswort mit den Verben: ac, aj, añj, ar, <hom>2.</hom> as, āp, i, idh, inv, <hom>2.</hom> iṣ, īr, īṣ, ukṣ, ṛñj, <hom>2.</hom> kir, kū, kṛ, krand, kram, <hom>1.</hom> kṣi, khan, khād, khid, khyā, gadh, gam <hom>1.</hom> <hom>2.</hom> gā, grabh, <hom>1.</hom> ghar, ghuṣ, cakṣ, car, <hom>1.</hom> ci, cit, cyu, jan, ji, jinv, jñā, taṃs, takṣ, <hom>1.</hom> tan, tap, tar, tuj, tud, tṛd, tṛp, dagh, dabh, dar, daśasy, <hom>1.</hom> <hom>3.</hom> dā, diś, <hom>2.</hom> dī, dīp, duh, dṛ, dṛś, <hom>1.</hom> dhā, dhāv, [Page169] dhī, dhunay, dhū, dhṛ, dhṛṣ, nam, <hom>2.</hom> naś, han, nī, <hom>1.</hom> nu, nṛt, <hom>1.</hom> pat, pan, par, <hom>2.</hom> pā, pi, piś, pur, pū, pṛc, pṛch, pyā, prath, prā, prī, budh, brū, bhaj, bhan, bhā, bhū, bhūṣ, bhṛ, man, mah, <hom>1.</hom> mā, mih, mī, mur, muṣ, muṣay, mṛj, myakṣ, yaj, yat, yam, <hom>1.</hom> yu, yuj, yudh, rakṣ, rabh, ri, rich, riś, riṣ, rih, <hom>1.</hom> ru, ruc, ruj, <hom>1.</hom> rudh, ruh, labh, vac, vañc, vad, vadh, van, varh, <hom>3.</hom> vas, vah, <hom>1.</hom> vā, vid, vivās, viś, vī, vṛ, vṛj, vṛt, vṛdh, vṛṣ, vraśc, śaṃs, śak, śā, śās, śir, śī, śuc, cri, <hom>1.</hom> śru, śrus, śvas, sac, saj, sad, si, sic, su, sū, sṛ, sṛj, skabh, stubh, sthā, svar, svid, han, hary, hi, hu, hū, hṛ, hvṛ. Hiervon ist nicht wesentlich verschieden der Fall, wo es in Verbindung mit einem Vocativ die Bedeutung {%heran, herbei%} hat: {10,11}; {418,5}, indem hier der Imperativ eines Verbs des Kommens zu ergänzen ist. <div n="P"><ab>Praep.</ab> mit vorhergehendem <ab>Acc.</ab>: 1〉 {%hin zu%} (örtlich), víśas (aś mit prá) {121,1}; (i mit antár) {298,3}; rájas {141,7}; barhís (sad) {142,7}; vásyas (nī) {192,16}; tā́n, ókas (yā) {548,4}; índram (syad) {739,6}; (kṣar) {778,28}; yónim (sad) {744,4}; {773,21}; {776,11}; {777,19}; (gam) {776,17}; {778,12}; pravátas (dhāv) {766,2}; eingeschoben: nas 〰 gṛhám (gam mit ā́) {848,6}; 2〉 mit einem Abstractum: {%zu%} (den Zweck ausdrückend), jóṣam, zum Genusse, zur Sättigung {77,5}; {559,4}; {639,28}; {703,6}; váram, zum Heile, zur Freude {88,2}; {230,2}; {522,6}; {586,5}. _{586,6}; {809,22}; {942,2}; 3〉 mit ánu verbunden, <ab n="siehe">s.</ab> ánu. <div n="P"><ab>Praep.</ab> mit folgendem <ab>Abl.</ab>: 1〉 {%bis an, bis hin%} (räumlich), gṛhébhias {287,20}; samudrā́t {611,2}; parāvátas {92,3}; divás {92,17}; ántāt (divás) {295,4}; gós {318,4}; {319,6}; 2〉 (zeitlich) vimócanāt {287,20}; nídhātos {41,9}; nimrúcas {161,10}; {151,5}; 3〉 {%für, um Willen,%} 〰 gós {299,9}; 4〉 {%von — her,%} ántāt, parākáat {30,21}. <div n="P"><ab>Praep.</ab> mit vorhergehendem <ab>Abl.</ab>: 1〉 {%von — her%} (räumlich), divás {72,8}; {134,4}; {168,4}; {408,1}; divás cid {273,2}; párvatāt {397,11}; pitṛ́bhyas {401,1}; {119,4}; dūrā́t cid {479,2}; gṛbhā́t {537,2}; asmát {917,12}; urós {808,3}; āsás {615,7}; samānā́t 〰 sádasas {208,7}; 2〉 {%aus%} (räumlich), avatā́t {116,22}; ārdrā́t {204,6}; hotrā́t {227,1}; potrā́t _{227,2}; brā́hmaṇāt {227,5}; praśāstrā́t {227,6}; giríbhyas {686,6}; 3〉 {%von%} wo {%stammend,%} tvát {264,1}; asmát (von unserer Partei) {846,8}; 4〉 {%aus%} etwas machen, kṣétrāt {119,7}; víśvasmāt ā́ janúṣas {208,6}; 5〉 {%aus%} dem Herzen, hṛdás {24,12}; {60,3}; {226,2}; 6〉 {%von — hinweg%} (räumlich), divás {33,7}; asmát {129,6}; {638,11}; {817,6}; 7〉 {%vor%} andern, <ab>d. h.</ab> in höherm, vorzüglichern Grade als andere, sakhíbhyas {4,4}; {757,2}; bahúbhyas {84,9}; carṣaṇíbhyas {84,20}; {333,8}; tisṛ́bhyas {196,5}; saptábhyas {851,11}; 8〉 {%zu — hin,%} wo man die umgekehrte Stellung erwarten sollte, asmát {92,16}; {144,3}; {410,3}; 9〉 ádhi ā́ <ab n="siehe">s.</ab> unter ádhi. <div n="P"><ab>Praep.</ab> mit vorhergehendem <ab>Loc.</ab>: 1〉 den Ort bezeichnend, an dem etwas sich befindet, oder (bei Verben der Bewegung) an den [Page170] etwas hingelangt, also {%an, auf, in, bei, zu,%} pastíāsu {25,10}; mā́nuṣeṣu {25,15}; {58,6}; upāké {27,6}; {307,1}; upásthe {31,9}; {786,5}; mádhye {33,11}; {164,30}; ádhvan {37,13}; {492,15}; {692,6}; dhánvan cid {38,7}; dáme {60,4}; {61,9}; {71,6}; {73,4}; {195,3}; {237,9}; {298,8}; {301,15}; {397,12}; {442,6}; {453,4}; {528,2}; {558,4}; dámeṣu {199,3}; {711,11}; rátheṣu {85,4}; {87,2}; {415,12}; ráthe {269,1}; {371,4}; samāné 〰 ráthe {500,5}; yávaseṣu {91,13}; {701,12}; triṣú {105,5}; parāké, astamīké {129,9}; ájman {112,17}; {472,2}; apsú {135,6}; {247,4}; {256,2}; {398,6}; yā́su (mātṛ́ṣu) {141,5}; ṛté {141,11}; {164,8}; {448,1}; váne {148,4}; {517,19}; {800,5}; {801,1}; pṛtsú {202,15}; váneṣu {263,6}; {774,8}; padé {149,1}; śáraṇe {150,1}; sadhásthe {240,4}; {418,5}; {665,20}; {866,2}; {890,8}; devéṣu {250,4}; yajñíyeṣu {548,13}; váre {257,4}; {287,11}; sádane {285,3}; váriman {293,3}; {350,4}; {854,2}; {855,7}; mártieṣu {297,1}; {428,8}; {456,3}; {631,1}; {680,11}; {822,4}; duroṇé {320,8}; {532,8}; {639,27}; {696,2}; {866,13}; citríṇīṣu {328,2}; dūré {361,4}; abhré {402,1}; dhruvé {450,4}; sioné {457,42}; gaṇé {481,1}; nā́huṣīṣu {487,7}; {626,24}; áśvayos {488,9}; ū́rmiāsu {489,6}; tanū́ṣu {640,26}; {777,30}; vikṣú {643,10}; {659,7}; gabhīré {676,11}; rájaḥsu {686,5}; {869,8}; camaséṣu {691,7}; kaláśeṣu {720,6}; {724,5}; pavítre {751,4}; {755,5}; {756,3}; {764,1}; {773,8}; {775,16}; {776,12}; {785,7}. _{785,9}; {797,10}; {798,22}. _{798,23}; camū́ṣu {775,2}; {811,8}; nadī́ṣu {780,6}; {788,1}; {819,13}; kóśe {787,3}; óṣadhīṣu {796,3}; samudré {797,10}; {898,7}; jáneṣu {848,2}; {890,11}; {1022,3}; kṣéme {853,4}; dharúṇe {870,4}; vakṣáṇāsu {875,10}; jaṭháre {922,13}; — eingeschoben: své 〰 dáme {143,4}; {193,4}; {226,7}; {823,2}; druhyaú 〰 jáne {487,8}; 2〉 {%bei%} einer Handlung, oder {%in%} einem Zustande, dhīṣú {17,8}; bháge {225,8}; samaryé {242,5}; {713,7}; samátsu {660,1}; {643,12}; mádeṣu {773,1}; {818,3}; ájmeṣu {441,7}; yā́man {320,2}; vraté {229,2}; várṇe {192,12}; bhayé {218,5}; uraú 〰 śárman {218,16}; 3〉 zeitlich: {%an, in,%} áhan {887,1}; mádhye {647,20}; śaśvatīṣu {669,17}; kíyāti {113,10}; {221,1}; 4〉 antár ā́, sácā ā́ <ab n="siehe">s.</ab> unter antár und sácā. <div n="P"><ab>Praep.</ab> mit Adverbien, die die Casus vertreten: asmadhríak ā́, zu uns her {805,4}; sanutár ā́, weit hinweg {492,2}; átas cid ā́, von dort her auch {314,1}. Die Verbindungen mit andern Präpositionen <ab n="siehe">s.</ab> unter den Casus. <div n="P">Conjunction {%und%} 1〉 zwischen die beiden zu verbindenden Worte gestellt: bhójanam 〰 paśúm {83,4}; várṇe 〰 saṃdṛ́śi {192,12}; śatám 〰 sahásram {205,7}; divás 〰 pṛthivyā́s ({317,3}); {499,4}; {522,7}; {555,5} (in {688,4} ist ā́ zu streichen; in {341,2} wol támasā zu lesen); śúcis 〰 pūtás {843,10}; paśvás 〰 gós {926,12}; 2〉 bei mehrfacher Aufzählung am Schlusse des letzten: {353,1}; {901,5}; so {842,11} devébhyas ca pitṛ́bhyas ā́, oder in beiden Gliedern wiederholt {918,8} sū́ras cid ā́ …, índrāt ā́ …; 3〉 hinter demjenigen Worte (den Worten) des angeknüpften Satztheiles, welches buchstäblich oder dem Sinne nach mit einem Worte des ersten Satztheiles stimmt, also vor dem als neu angeknüpften, [Page171] <ab>z. B.</ab> {265,3} mahā́n gárbhas máhi ā́ jātám eṣām; {7,2}; {460,1}; {806,4}; {901,5}; {307,1}; 4〉 am Schlusse oder vor dem schliessenden Verb des angeknüpften Satztheiles: {48,16}; {150,1}; {250,5}; {308,2}; {441,3}; so ist auch wol in {1022,4} (sanvantu ā́ vásu) ā́ als Conjunction zu fassen. <div n="P">Hervorhebende Partikel 1〉 nach Wörtern der Zahl oder des Grades, um auszudrücken, dass diese Zahl oder dieser Grad ganz erreicht sei: trís {20,7}; besonders in der Formel trís ā́ divás, je dreimal des Tages {142,3}; {288,11}; {290,5}—_{290,8}; víśvam {38,10}; {402,2}; {780,9}; ásāmi {848,3}; ubháyāsas {517,20}; ī́vat {666,21}; várṣiṣṭhas {37,6}; pániṣṭhas {500,2}; sadyás {122,14}; múhur {195,5}; {536,2}; 2〉 so nach <ab>Adj.</ab> oder <ab>Adv.</ab>, die einer Steigerung fähig sind, um einen recht hohen Grad zu bezeichnen, {%recht:%} <chg type="chg" n="56" src="gra"><old>mandānā́s</old><new>mandānā́</new></chg> cid {610,11}; máhi {265,14}; tṛpát {266,2}; manuṣvát {105,13}. _{105,14}; ähnlich wol beim <ab>Infin.</ab> dāváne {122,5} und bei smát {887,8}; 3〉 bei <ab>Subst.</ab> und <ab>Adj.</ab> in dem Sinne: sich recht als solchen zeigend, {%recht als, recht wie:%} durévas {457,31}; devás {307,6}; {631,1}; jārás {134,3}; {837,6}; aryás {486,33}; {703,3}; {773,11}; {1017,1}; sómas {278,1}; dhartā́ram {738,2}; so auch jātás 〰 harmiéṣu {872,3}; śriyeś 〰 {806,4}; 4〉 hinter Verben: {361,7} dā́tā ná dā́ti ā́ paśús. <LEND>

<L>830<pc>040<k1>A<k2>A +ā pref. <div n="1"/>1 <lang n="czech">značí hranici, přibližnost, deminutivnost</lang> <div n="1"/>2 <lang n="russian">обозначает предел (границу), приблизительность, имеет уменьшительное значение</lang> <div n="1"/>3 <lang n="english">implies limit, approximation, diminution</lang> <LEND>
